name: AcBel Polytech Inc.
summary: AcBel Polytech Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells power management solutions worldwide. It provides a range of custom design and high quality power supplies ranging from 3W up to 10,000W per power module. The company offers industrial PSUs, adapters, medical PSUs, telecom PSUs, AC DC / DC DC converters, and EV PSU solution. Its products are used in information technology, communication, consumer electronics, networks, and industrial automation applications. The company was formerly known as API Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AcBel Polytech Inc. in 1998. AcBel Polytech Inc. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
